Figure 1: Overview of the structure of this work. To address the limitations of existing works, Section 2 formulate a dataset-level, non-strict symmetry constraint and the associated restoration model. This forms the foundation for the analyses in Sections 3 and 4, which reveal that data symmetry governs operator equivariance and network empirical risk. These findings motivate the adaptive equivariant network design in Section 5, achieving better alignment between model equivariance and data symmetry and leading to improved performance.
